name: todoist
description: Manage Todoist tasks, projects, and boards — plan your day, automate workflows, and move tasks between sections
author: chart-skills

api.auth: Personal API token (TODOIST_API_TOKEN env var). Get at https://app.todoist.com/app/settings/integrations/developer

changes: Full CRUD for tasks, projects, sections, labels, comments
Board view: tasks grouped by section (kanban-style)
Day planning: today view (overdue + due today), upcoming view
Task filtering using Todoist filter syntax
auto_move_by_due_date automation: move tasks between sections based on due date rules
CLI interface with subcommands for all operations
